title: pelargonium × pallidulum
intro: Pelargonium × pallidulum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium fasciculatum. The roots and leaves of this plant contain various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds, which contribute to its therapeutic uses. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × pallidulum include essential oils, teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
